title: All at Once
description: First group attack. The party is surprised it worked.

steps.text: All of them moved at the same time. This should, historically, have ended in a pile of limbs and apologies. Somehow it didn't.

lines.speaker: Fighter
lines.text: I didn't stab anyone by accident.

lines.speaker: Cleric
lines.text: Statistically improbable, but we're counting it.

lines.speaker: Bard
lines.text: That was a formation. An actual formation.

lines.speaker: Mage
lines.text: It was more of a suggestion the monster strongly disagreed with.

lines.speaker: Bard
lines.text: Either way, I'm writing it down.

lines.speaker: Mage
lines.text: We'll regret making this a habit. Briefly.

steps.text: They all had to rest afterward. Everyone's Action Points were, as Mage put it, 'spiritually overdrawn.'
